loop1.title: Thermal Life
loop1.note: Showing active power as a proxy for thermal loss; winding and oil temperatures are not measured by this meter.

loop1.title: Thermal Timeline
loop1.note: Showing load factor trend (active_power_total_kw) — transformer temperature (hotspot/oil/winding) is not measured by this electrical meter.

loop1.title: Life & Capacity
loop1.note: Showing thermal load as a proxy for aging (load factor) and apparent power for capacity; insulation aging factor and status labels are not measured by this asset.

loop1.title: Insulation Aging & Loss of Life
loop1.note: Showing aging factor and loss of life based on active power and energy; hotspot temperature is not measured by this electrical meter. lifetime isn't measured for this leaf on this asset — the only candidate was a energy value (progressActivePct), a different physical quantity, so the leaf is left blank (and 1 other leaf(s)) rather than shown under the wrong unit.
